name: Channeller's ring
hoverSummary: Magic ring with 34.5 magic damage bonus and stacking critical bonuses on channelled abilities.
detailLines: Provides 34.5 magic damage bonus and 5 prayer bonus.
Passive: Runic Embrace grants +4% stacking critical strike chance per hit on magic channelled abilities.
Enchantment of metaphysics adds stacking critical strike damage after the ring has been equipped for 9 seconds.
implementationNotes: Curated magic ring from the live Channeller's ring page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for style bonus and Runic Embrace passive text.
